title: marsilea minuta
intro: Marsilea minuta, also known as the dwarf waterclover or small waterclover, is a small aquatic plant that belongs to the family Marsileaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Marsilea minuta include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of kidney stones and urinary tract infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
